title: nigritella austriaca subsp. iberica
intro: Nigritella austriaca subsp. iberica is a type of orchid found in the Iberian Peninsula, also known as the Iberian Nigritella or Black Helleborine. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including relieving coughs, bronchitis, and other respiratory conditions, as well as aiding digestion and reducing inflammation. Herbal preparations of Nigritella austriaca subsp. iberica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
